changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P5 abstraction given physical behavior
changes.before: The numbers showed the same mark feeding the sickest towns, and the same trouble kept moving south on wagon routes, farther than any one village could see.
changes.after: The numbers showed the same mark feeding the sickest towns, and the same contaminated grain kept moving south on wagon routes, farther than any one village could see.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P1 infrastructure with provisioning verb
changes.before: South and west instead, into the heavy grain roads that fed the kingdom's interior, the ones laid in her grandmother's day to drag harvest out of the Andorhal basin.
changes.after: South and west instead, into the heavy grain roads laid in her grandmother's day to drag harvest out of the Andorhal basin and deeper into the kingdom's interior.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P1 infrastructure with physical-behavior verb
changes.before: Four days more and they would be deep in the basin, where every road thickened.
changes.after: Four days more and they would be deep in the basin, where the roads lay closer together.

changes.before: Through the office glass she could see a stack of invoices on the sill.
changes.after: Through the office glass, a stack of invoices sat on the sill.

changes.before: The room was empty. Not stripped, not wholly. Writing kit on the desk. Ledgers on the shelf. But the man who should have been at the desk was gone, and two of the ledgers on the bottom shelf were too new.
changes.after: The room was empty. Writing kit on the desk. Ledgers on the shelf. But the man who should have been at the desk was gone, and two of the ledgers on the bottom shelf were too new.

changes.feedbackRef: A → intent-smear-agency-laundering-guide.md → P1 repeated infrastructure smear
changes.before: South of Millbrook Spur the King's Road thickened into the main grain road, the one that fed straight into Andorhal and then branched to half the kingdom.
changes.after: South of Millbrook Spur the King's Road widened into the main grain road, the one that ran straight into Andorhal before branching toward half the kingdom.

changes.before: Not honest surprise. Or not only that.
She had only chosen the road they were already riding toward.
changes.after: Millbrook Spur had cut the choices down to one.
